title: cdad Config
description: Schema for the optional `cdad.config.json` repository configuration file.

contracts_directory.description: Directory that contains capability contract files.

report_output.description: Default path for the `cdad check` report output.

roadmap_output.description: Default path for the `cdad roadmap` output.

additional_contract_patterns.description: Extra glob patterns that count as contract files during scans.

items.description: Additional file pattern that should be treated as a contract signal.

additional_adr_directories.description: Additional directories that should be treated as ADR locations.

items.description: Directory path to scan for ADRs.

ignore.description: Paths or directories to ignore during scans.

items.description: Path or directory name to ignore.

strict.description: Whether validation warnings should be treated as errors.

require_behavioral_layer.description: Whether extended-contract behavioral fields are required in all validated contracts.

require_evolutionary_layer.description: Whether extended-contract evolutionary fields are required in all validated contracts.

default_scope.description: Default graph scope used when the graph command is invoked without a scope argument.

mermaid_theme.description: Default Mermaid theme used when rendering graph output.
